---
title: Login Template
description: A standard authentication page template built using Nirmaan UI components.
---

import { LoginTemplate } from '@nirman/components';
import Playground from '../../../components/Playground.astro';

The `LoginTemplate` is a fully functional, standard authentication page layout constructed purely from **Layer 1** and **Layer 2** design system components (Inputs, Checkboxes, Buttons). It serves as a plug-and-play **Layer 3 (Template)** for your applications.

## 1. Interactive Preview

This interactive demo shows the default look of the `LoginTemplate`. The entire component is composed using semantic design tokens and strict component APIs to ensure a consistent cross-platform experience.

<Playground>
  <div style={{ transform: 'scale(0.85)', transformOrigin: 'top center', width: '100%' }}>
    <LoginTemplate client:load />
  </div>
</Playground>

## 2. Developer Implementation

Because this is a predefined template in the `@nirman/components` package, developers can import and drop this directly into their page routes without redefining layout CSS.

```tsx
import { LoginTemplate } from '@nirman/components';

function LoginPage() {
  const handleLogin = (email, password, remember) => {
    console.log('Authenticating...', { email, remember });
  };

  return (
    <LoginTemplate 
      title="Welcome back to Nirmaan"
      subtitle="Sign in with your organizational email."
      onLogin={handleLogin}
      onForgotPassword={() => alert('Forgot password clicked')}
      onSignUp={() => alert('Sign up clicked')}
    />
  );
}

export default LoginPage;
```

## 3. Customization & Props

The `LoginTemplate` exposes several props to adapt to different scenarios while enforcing layout and margin constraints strictly.

| Prop | Type | Description |
| ---- | ---- | ----------- |
| `logo` | `React.ReactNode` | Optional logo element displayed above the title. |
| `title` | `string` | The main `h1` heading. Defaults to "Welcome back". |
| `subtitle` | `string` | Descriptive text below the title. |
| `isLoading` | `boolean` | When `true`, disables the form and changes the primary button to a loading state. |
| `onLogin` | `(email, pass, remember) => void` | Triggers when the user successfully submits the form. |
| `onForgotPassword` | `() => void` | Optional. If provided, renders the "Forgot password?" link. |
| `onSignUp` | `() => void` | Optional. If provided, renders the bottom sign up banner. |
